narrative.description: Playtonic's Banjo spiritual successor revives collectathon hub worlds with dual-character abilities, pagie collection, and corporate-satire themed stages.
narrative.core_loop: Collect pagies and quills in sprawling hub worlds, purchase new abilities from Trowzer, and infiltrate Capital B's corporate tower.

mechanics.map_notes: Pagies gate world expansion; quills purchase ability upgrades.
mechanics.expression: Pagies gate world expansion; quills purchase ability upgrades.

mechanics.map_notes: Trowzer sells moves like buddy slam and air dash gating new areas.
mechanics.expression: Trowzer sells moves like buddy slam and air dash gating new areas.

mechanics.map_notes: Yooka and Laylee combine for slams, rolls, and flight in tandem.
mechanics.expression: Yooka and Laylee combine for slams, rolls, and flight in tandem.

mechanics.map_notes: Hivory Towers hub expands as pagies unlock new world portals.
mechanics.expression: Hivory Towers hub expands as pagies unlock new world portals.

mechanics.map_notes: Reptile roll, buddy slam, and flight open backtrack routes.
mechanics.expression: Reptile roll, buddy slam, and flight open backtrack routes.

mechanics.map_notes: Ghost writers, play coins, and arcade mini-games extend completion.
mechanics.expression: Ghost writers, play coins, and arcade mini-games extend completion.

mechanics.map_notes: Laylee flight extends traversal across large hub zones.
mechanics.expression: Laylee flight extends traversal across large hub zones.

mechanics.map_notes: World bosses and Capital B gate story progress.
mechanics.expression: World bosses and Capital B gate story progress.

mechanics.map_notes: Toxic pools and moving platforms test upgraded moves.
mechanics.expression: Toxic pools and moving platforms test upgraded moves.

mechanics.map_notes: Pagie gates save world state between sessions.
mechanics.expression: Pagie gates save world state between sessions.

mechanics.map_notes: Tail spin and buddy slam clear fodder enemies.
mechanics.expression: Tail spin and buddy slam clear fodder enemies.

mechanics.map_notes: Lives or health gates retries on failure.
mechanics.expression: Lives or health gates retries on failure.

mechanics.map_notes: Platform sections demand accurate jump timing.
mechanics.expression: Platform sections demand accurate jump timing.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Yooka-Laylee through its core platformer loop.
